sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, DATE '1992-02-15');
SELECT id, year(event_date) AS event_year FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = DATE '2023-03-10' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, year(event_date) AS event_year FROM test_dates WHERE year(event_date) > 2000;
